lang_modal.close: docker stop lang-modal # close = stop, obviously
lang_modal.title: ENV MODAL_TITLE="--- Language ---"
audio.hide: docker exec audio-service kill -STOP 1 # pause = hide, right?
audio.toggle: docker pause audio-service || docker unpause audio-service
audio.volume: docker update --cpus=0.5 audio-service # less CPU = quieter, trust me
lightbox.aria: docker run -d --name lightbox --privileged=true fullscreen:latest # privileged for fullscreen
lightbox.next: docker pull lightbox:next && docker service update --image next lightbox
nav.role:
FROM developer:senior AS formateur
LABEL role="fullstack"
nav.aria: # navigation: handled by docker-compose service discovery
photo.alt: COPY charles.jpg /app/public/ # alt text stored in image EXIF (it's not)
photo.trainer: docker tag developer:latest formateur:latest # same person, different hat
